title: Burn the Witch Custom GUI Pack
description: Burn the Witch Custom GUI Pack
body:
It's GUI ONLY Resource pack

so you can freely use it with other resource packs. Just place it on top of resource pack you use.

This is a GUI packed themed towards the show "Burn the Witch". Don't hesitate to comment down below , I have even changed hot bar as well hope you enjoy.
The palette that I choose is Green & Red & Yellow but maybe in the future.
If you guys want other colors like Blue & white or any colors else.
please tell me I will think about it!
If you found any bugs please report to me I will fix it as soon as I can.
